title: derris elliptica var. glaucophylla
intro: Derris elliptica var. glaucophylla, also known as the glaucous derris, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is a climbing vine with medicinal properties that have been utilized in traditional medicine for its ability to act as a natural insecticide and to treat various health conditions. The plant's leaves and roots contain rotenone and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing potential health benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and protection against certain diseases. Derris elliptica var. glaucophylla can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
